commands.review_summary:
This PR adds nonblank configured `agents.list[].description` values to `agents_list` output, updates the tool description/docs, and refreshes focused tests and prompt snapshots.

PR surface: Source +12, Tests +88, Docs +2, Generated 0. Total +102 across 12 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction. Source inspection gives a high-confidence state check: current main accepts `agents.list[].description`, but the current `agents_list` implementation omits descriptions from returned entries.

target.title: feat(agents): add description field for dynamic agent discovery
target.body:
## Summary

Adds an optional `description` field to agent config that enables orchestrator agents to understand sub-agent capabilities at runtime via `agents_list`.

This was originally requested in #7490. A previous attempt (PR #7530 by @gavinbmoore) was auto-closed by the stale bot due to CI failures and inactivity — the change itself was reviewed positively. This PR re-implements the same feature against the current main.

## Changes

- Add `description?: string` to `AgentConfig` type
- Add `description` to `AgentEntrySchema` (zod validation)
- Update `agents_list` tool output to include description when set
- Update `agents_list` tool description to reflect the new field
- Add tests: description included when configured, omitted when absent

## Use Case

In multi-agent setups, orchestrators need to route tasks to the right sub-agent without hardcoding catalogs. With this change:

```yaml
agents:
  list:
    - id: analyzer
      name: Data Analyzer
      description: 'Statistical analysis, chart generation, anomaly detection'
    - id: writer
      name: Report Writer
      description: 'Summarization, formatting, document generation'
```

`agents_list` returns:
```json
{
  "agents": [
    { "id": "analyzer", "name": "Data Analyzer", "description": "Statistical analysis, chart generation, anomaly detection", "configured": true },
    { "id": "writer", "name": "Report Writer", "description": "Summarization, formatting, document generation", "configured": true }
  ]
}
```

This is fully backward compatible — existing configs without `description` are unaffected.

Closes #7490

## Real behavior proof

- Behavior or issue addressed: Optional `agents.list[].description` is accepted by config, documented, regenerated into config docs, and surfaced by the `agents_list` tool after rebasing onto current `origin/main`.
- Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw source checkout at `/tmp/openclaw/openclaw-pr-fix` on macOS Darwin 25.4.0 arm64 with Node v22.22.2 and pnpm 10.33.2; branch `feat/agents-description-field`, head `fe1abe0f91c8`.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/test-projects.mjs --maxWorkers=4 src/agents/openclaw-tools.agents.test.ts src/agents/tools/agents-list-tool.test.ts src/config/schema.base.generated.test.ts test/scripts/prompt-snapshots.test.ts`; `pnpm config:docs:check`; `pnpm prompt:snapshots:check`; `pnpm config:schema:check`; `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/openclaw-tools.agents.test.ts src/agents/tools/agents-list-tool.ts src/config/types.agents.ts src/config/zod-schema.agent-runtime.ts src/plugins/contracts/extension-runtime-dependencies.contract.test.ts`.
- Evidence after fix: Redacted terminal output from the local real checkout:
  ```text
  node scripts/test-projects.mjs --maxWorkers=4 src/agents/openclaw-tools.agents.test.ts src/agents/tools/agents-list-tool.test.ts src/config/schema.base.generated.test.ts test/scripts/prompt-snapshots.test.ts
  test/scripts/prompt-snapshots.test.ts: 9 tests passed
  src/config/schema.base.generated.test.ts: 4 tests passed
  src/agents/tools/agents-list-tool.test.ts: 4 tests passed
  src/agents/openclaw-tools.agents.test.ts: 7 tests passed
  [test] passed 2 Vitest shards in 34.43s

  pnpm config:docs:check
  OK docs/.generated/config-baseline.sha256

  pnpm prompt:snapshots:check
  Prompt snapshots are current (7 files).

  pnpm config:schema:check
  [base-config-schema] ok

  node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/openclaw-tools.agents.test.ts src/agents/tools/agents-list-tool.ts src/config/types.agents.ts src/config/zod-schema.agent-runtime.ts src/plugins/contracts/extension-runtime-dependencies.contract.test.ts
  Found 0 warnings and 0 errors.
  Finished in 1.2s on 5 files with 213 rules using 1 threads.
  ```
- Observed result after fix: The local checkout generated current prompt/config artifacts, the `agents_list` focused coverage passed, and GitHub reports the PR head `fe1abe0f91c8` as `mergeable=MERGEABLE`.
- What was not tested: A live multi-host subagent fleet was not exercised; the proof uses a local OpenClaw checkout and focused tool/config validation.
